name: A musty winery
description:
Wine is distilled and prepared in this musty workshop.  Locally grown
grapes--green ones because red will not grow here--are used to make refreshing,
sparkling white wines.  Locked away in a cellar, the wines are left to mature.
Being immortal the elves have time and patience to wait.  A tub full of grapes
is here ready to be stomped.
